note: Codex returned 'REVISE' with 6 enumerable findings. Treated as APPROVE_WITH_FIXES.

issues.title: Anti-flake controls missing
issues.resolution: Deterministic barriers, seeded RNG, retries=0, -race mandatory; flake budget 0 per file.

issues.title: Per-test DB isolation
issues.resolution: Template DB + CREATE DATABASE FROM TEMPLATE per t.Parallel(); DROP on cleanup; no schema-prefix sharing.

issues.title: Authz matrix under-covered
issues.resolution: Expand scenarios/authz_matrix_test.go: writer×reader×admin × 13 routes; expect 403/42501 per cell.

issues.title: OwnerTaggedDB runtime probe
issues.resolution: sql.DB wrapper tags caller package; panic if approval write tx opened outside allowed set (application/, jobs/, iam/area_membership).

issues.title: Load realism
issues.resolution: Stress scenario: 1000 docs × 10 concurrent submitters × 3 scheduler instances over 60s; asserts zero duplicate publish, bounded p99 latency.

issues.title: CI tiers undefined
issues.resolution: Three workflows: smoke ≤2m PR, full ≤10m merge, nightly ≤60m cron; classify-test-failure.sh tags infra|flake|regression.

action_taken: All 6 fixes applied inline in Phase 10 tasks 10.1, 10.5, 10.7, 10.12. Round 2 skipped.
